visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black turtleneck, sits in a brightly lit indoor studio or home setting with a plain off-white wall background. She looks directly at the camera with a neutral but engaging facial expression, holding a large white bag with pink and green strawberry graphics. Large white and black captions appear across the center of the frame. (2) The scene cuts to a medium close-up as she introduces a red box titled 'Strawberry Sun Cakes' (草莓太陽餅). She opens the box with her hands, revealing individually wrapped pastry items inside. The lighting remains consistent and bright. Yellow and black variety text '改口!' appears briefly as she takes a bite of the pastry, displaying a surprised and delighted facial expression while chewing. (3) She presents a red 'Strawberry Jelly' (草莓凍) box featuring realistic images of strawberries. She carefully peels back the film of a small jelly cup, and clear liquid drips onto her hands. Her eyes widen in a comical expression of surprise. A black-and-white filter is briefly applied to the frame while she takes a large bite of the red jelly. (4) The woman holds a bag of 'Dried Strawberry' (草莓乾) against her face. She opens the bag to show a clear plastic tray filled with dark, shriveled red fruit pieces. Her facial expression becomes highly animated as she tastes one, pointing her finger at the snack while nodding and smiling. Neon-green variety text '我喜歡' overlays the screen. (5) In the final phase, she holds the dried strawberry bag and gestures with her hands toward the camera while speaking enthusiastically. A large yellow and white text box at the bottom of the screen details giveaway rules. The setting remains the same throughout, focusing on her reactions and the product packaging.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 只有苗栗買得到的草莓零食 Strawberry snacks you can only get in Miaoli. (2) [Subtitle]: 1. 草莓太陽餅. [Subtitle]: 其實一開始覺得還好. (3) [Subtitle]: 因為草莓味沒有很明顯. [Variety]: 改口! [Subtitle]: 這個比原味好吃. (4) [Subtitle]: 2. 草莓凍. [Variety]: 超級草莓顏色. [Variety]: !!! [Subtitle]: 裡面流出水來了. [Variety]: 大口. (5) [Subtitle]: 感覺放冰箱或冷凍庫後吃會更好吃!!!. (6) [Subtitle]: 3. 草莓乾. (7) [Subtitle]: 我之前看過葡萄乾或是芒果乾可是... [Subtitle]: 原來也有草莓乾... [Variety]: (一點都沒期待). (8) [Variety]: 我喜歡. [Variety]: (收到衝擊). [Subtitle]: 這就是Nature軟糖!!! [Subtitle]: 好吃很多很多. (9) [Subtitle]: 草莓籽咬下去有脆脆的口感. [Subtitle]: 就是它的靈魂!. [Variety]: 興奮. (10) [Subtitle]: 超爆好吃. [Subtitle]: 也沒有放防腐劑, 人工色素. (11) [Slogan]: 想吃看看的人記得現在留言! 抽獎規則請參考留言區 1.分享 & 收藏 2. 留言.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator presenting the food items.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing a black high-neck turtleneck sweater and light makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple, clean indoor background with an off-white or light beige wall. There are no distracting furniture or objects other than the snacks being presented.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy female voice speaks in Traditional Chinese Mandarin over an upbeat, 124 BPM electronic pop track featuring heavy synth bass and a steady percussion beat. The voice is clear and projected. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers as the visual transitions to the first snack. The speaker's pitch rises when describing the strawberry flavor. (3) A distinct 'ding' sound effect occurs when a text overlay appears, followed by the faint rustling of plastic packaging being opened. The music remains at a consistent volume. (4) As the jelly is opened, a short, comical 'boing' or cartoon SFX plays, emphasizing her surprise. The sound of a large bite and brief chewing is audible before she continues speaking. (5) A series of 'pop' and 'magic sparkle' SFX accompany the introduction of the dried strawberries. The speaker's arousal level increases, with higher vocal variability and faster speech rate. The BGM maintains its high energy until a final hard cut at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Item Review 1 -> Item Review 2 -> Item Review 3 -> Giveaway CTA.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote strawberry-themed snacks exclusive to Miaoli, Taiwan, by providing a high-energy review and hosting a social media giveaway to increase engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, verbal endorsement, and a giveaway competition organized by the creator.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social-media-native food review with high production value in terms of SFX and text overlays to maximize audience retention.
